mapper.select: /** UsptReprtHistDao.selectList */ select urh.hist_id , urh.reprt_id , urh.opetr_id , urh.reprt_sttus_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('${@aicluster.pms.common.util.Code@REPRT_CODE_GROUP}', urh.reprt_sttus_cd) as reprt_sttus , urh.process_cn , urh.creator_id , urh.created_dt , ci.member_nm as opetr_nm , ci.login_id , row_number() over (order by urh.created_dt desc) as rn from uspt_reprt_hist urh left outer join cmmt_insider ci on ci.member_id = urh.opetr_id where urh.reprt_id = #{reprtId} order by urh.created_dt desc
